#  Search for and Filter RFIs (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Use the search tool to further narrow the displayed results. The search tool respects any selected filter parameters and will only search for items within the filtered results.
    * This asset or item can be viewed or edited in offline mode provided that it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device.


##  Steps 
#### Search for an RFI
  1. Navigate to the project's **RFIs** tool using the Procore app on an iOS device.
  2. Tap the **Search** bar.  
![Rfi Ios Search Rfis](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b39a8564d9e67a3831d088511d05c65/eba996bfe8948d6087344a04689a881a/rfi-ios-search-rfis.png?fm=webp)
  3. Enter a keyword or phrase.  
​Procore searches the following fields for matches:
     * Number
     * Subject
     * Question
     * Response


#### Filter the RFIs Log
  1. Navigate to the project's **RFIs** tool.
  2. Tap **Filter**.  
![Rfi Ios Filter Rfis](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d8f9c440af70147fe4ea1d2807583e7e/bd690623af8fd5ab8c0367b687439c72/rfi-ios-filter-rfis.png?fm=webp)
  3. Tap one or more of the following options to set the filters:
     * Group By:* Specification Section* Package
     * Status
     * Project Stage
     * Location
     * Ball in Court
     * Responsible Contractor
     * Specification Section
  4. Tap **Apply**.  
_Note:_ To remove filters at any time, tap **Reset All Filters**.


## See Also
  * [View RFIs (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/tutorials/view-rfis-ios)
  * [RFIs (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/permissions)
title: Search for and Filter RFIs (iOS)
description: How to search for and filter RFIs using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
